  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Reordering sections must preserve a coherent argument chain between premises, methods, results, and contribution.",
    "R1.5": "The user explicitly requests restructuring of section-level flow and narrative arc across the provided material.",
    "RX.1": "State any assumptions or uncertainty about the optimal ordering and boundaries of the reorganization.",
    "RX.2": "Do not imply changes to scientific claims or performance as a result of reordering alone.",
    "RX.3": "Remain strictly within the scope of section/paragraph reordering without rewriting content or adding analysis.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid reorganizations that could mislead readers by overemphasizing speculative claims or underemphasizing limitations.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain clear provenance by preserving attributions and relationships to prior work when moving content."
  }
}

rationale.R1.2: Reordering sections must preserve a coherent argument chain between premises, methods, results, and contribution.
rationale.R1.5: The user explicitly requests restructuring of section-level flow and narrative arc across the provided material.
rationale.RX.1: State any assumptions or uncertainty about the optimal ordering and boundaries of the reorganization.
rationale.RX.2: Do not imply changes to scientific claims or performance as a result of reordering alone.
rationale.RX.3: Remain strictly within the scope of section/paragraph reordering without rewriting content or adding analysis.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid reorganizations that could mislead readers by overemphasizing speculative claims or underemphasizing limitations.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain clear provenance by preserving attributions and relationships to prior work when moving content.
